reasons.detail: Ron's table has 0 rows for this client_id across all months. All waterfall apps are incremental — they were previously untracked.
10 apps attributed via campaign_id extracted from URL parameters (gad_campaignid) or attribution string patterns. Campaign-level attribution without keyword detail. Campaigns: Unknown Campaign.

8 apps identified as Google Ads via category='Paid' + subcategory='Google Ads' but no campaign_id could be extracted. These are in the 'Other Google Ads' bucket. The attribution string may lack a gad_campaignid param or use an unrecognized format.

Top 1 of 1 campaigns:
  Unknown Campaign: 10 apps (T1=0, T2=10, T3=0)

discrepancy.explanation: Ron's staging.google_ads_campaign_data has NO rows for client_id='commonwealth_one_fcu'. This client has not been onboarded into Ron's pipeline yet. Our waterfall is the only source of Google Ads attribution.

recommendations.title: Ron's pipeline has no data for this client
recommendations.impact: All 18 waterfall apps are incremental — previously untracked
recommendations.action: No discrepancy to investigate. Our waterfall is the first pipeline to attribute Google Ads for this client. Ron's staging.google_ads_campaign_data table has 0 rows for this client_id. This means we are providing attribution data that did not exist before.

recommendations.title: 10 apps with campaign-level attribution (T2)
recommendations.impact: Campaign ID extracted from URL params or attribution string
recommendations.action: These 10 apps have campaign_id attribution from either: (a) gad_campaignid URL parameter, (b) campaign ID embedded in the attribution string pattern, or (c) gbraid/wbraid iOS privacy-safe click identifiers. Campaign-level KPIs (apps, approved, funded, LTV) are reliable.

recommendations.title: 8 apps still in T3 (44.4%)
recommendations.action: Investigate T3 attribution strings for extractable campaign IDs
